_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Loba moninga, mpe kota.
speakFriend.description: Liana Banyan ezali miso ya bato nyonso. Monoko nyonso ezali na matomba moko ya kobalola.
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Liste ya minoko mpe misure ya Marks ezali ya sima na. Marks ezali tokens ya kozanga, te aksi.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Balola Liana Banyan na {{language}}. Zwa {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.scopeWelcome: Mikanda ya Boyei bino / Mokili ya Mizimu
speakFriend.scopeNavigation: Malembo ya nzela mpe mitindo ya mabuta
speakFriend.baseLanguage: Monoko ya ebandeli -- matomba esengami te.
speakFriend.speakFounderTitle: Liloba ya Motandisi: Mpo na Nini Maloba Oyo
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Liloba nyonso na eteni oyo ezwi nkombo na ntina. Ebandeli ya nkombo 26 ya ntina.
speakFriend.howBountiesWork: Matomba ya Kobalola Esalaka Ndenge Nini
speakFriend.step1Body: Fungola Matomba ya Kobalola na Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Balola misinga nyonso. Tinda na Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Sima na kobondelema, ozwi Marks mpe ozalisi na IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Loba moninga, okota."

languageSwitcher.tip: Zala na mots de passe ya minoko ndenge na ndenge na Porte ya Durin!
